ra.action.add.description: Label for the button to add a new record

ra.action.cancel.description: Label for the button to cancel an action

ra.action.clear_array_input.description: Label for the button to clear an array input

ra.action.close.description: Label for the button to close a dialog or panel

ra.action.confirm.description: Label for the button to confirm an action

ra.action.create.description: Label for the button to create a new record

ra.action.delete.description: Label for the button to delete one or more records

ra.action.edit.description: Label for the button to edit a record

ra.action.move_down.description: Label for the button to move an item down in a list

ra.action.move_up.description: Label for the button to move an item up in a list

ra.action.refresh.description: Label for the button to refresh the current view

ra.action.remove.description: Label for the button to remove an item

ra.action.save.description: Label for the button to save changes

ra.action.undo.description: Label for the button to undo the last action

ra.action.update.description: Label for the button to update a record

ra.auth.auth_check_error.description: Message shown when the user needs to login

ra.boolean.true.description: Label for the true boolean value

ra.boolean.false.description: Label for the false boolean value

ra.input.references.all_missing.description: Error message when all references are missing

ra.input.references.many_missing.defaultMessage: At least one of the associated references no longer appears to be available.
ra.input.references.many_missing.description: Error message when many references are missing

ra.input.references.single_missing.defaultMessage: Associated reference no longer appears to be available.
ra.input.references.single_missing.description: Error message when a single reference is missing

ra.message.bulk_delete_content.defaultMessage: {smart_count, plural, one {Are you sure you want to delete this item?} other {Are you sure you want to delete these # items?}}
ra.message.bulk_delete_content.description: Confirmation message when deleting one or more records

ra.message.bulk_delete_title.description: Title for the bulk delete confirmation dialog

ra.message.clear_array_input.defaultMessage: Are you sure you want to clear the whole list?
ra.message.clear_array_input.description: Confirmation message when clearing an array input

ra.message.delete_content.defaultMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this {name}?
ra.message.delete_content.description: Confirmation message when deleting a record

ra.message.delete_title.description: Title for the delete confirmation dialog

ra.message.invalid_form.defaultMessage: The form is not valid. Please check for errors
ra.message.invalid_form.description: Error message shown when a form is invalid

ra.message.select_all_limit_reached.defaultMessage: {max, plural, one {There are too many elements to select them all. Only the first element was selected.} other {There are too many elements to select them all. Only the first # elements were selected.} }
ra.message.select_all_limit_reached.description: Message shown when select all reaches its limit

ra.message.unsaved_changes.defaultMessage: Some of your changes weren't saved. Are you sure you want to ignore them?
ra.message.unsaved_changes.description: Confirmation message when leaving a page with unsaved changes

ra.message.update_content.defaultMessage: {smart_count, plural, one {Are you sure you want to update {name} {recordRepresentation}?} other {Are you sure you want to update these # items?}}
ra.message.update_content.description: Confirmation message when updating one or more records

ra.message.update_title.description: Title for the update confirmation dialog

ra.navigation.next.description: Label for the button to go to the next page

ra.navigation.page.description: Label for the button to go to a specific page

ra.navigation.page_range_info.description: Message showing the current page range and total number of records

ra.navigation.previous.description: Label for the button to go to the previous page

ra.notification.created.description: Notification shown when a record is successfully created

ra.notification.data_provider_error.defaultMessage: dataProvider error. Check the console for details.
ra.notification.data_provider_error.description: Notification shown when a dataProvider error occurs

ra.notification.deleted.defaultMessage: {smart_count, plural, one {Element deleted} other {# elements deleted}}
ra.notification.deleted.description: Notification shown when one or more records are successfully deleted

ra.notification.http_error.description: Notification shown when an HTTP error occurs

ra.notification.item_doesnt_exist.description: Notification shown when a record does not exist

ra.notification.logged_out.defaultMessage: Your session has ended, please reconnect.
ra.notification.logged_out.description: Notification shown when the user is logged out

ra.notification.not_authorized.defaultMessage: You're not authorized to access this resource.
ra.notification.not_authorized.description: Notification shown when the user is not authorized

ra.notification.updated.defaultMessage: {smart_count, plural, one {Element updated} other {# elements updated}}
ra.notification.updated.description: Notification shown when one or more records are successfully updated

ra.page.create.description: Title for the record creation page

ra.page.edit.description: Title for the record edition page

ra.page.list.description: Title for the record list page

ra.page.show.description: Title for the record show page

ra.validation.email.description: Validation error message for email inputs

ra.validation.maxLength.defaultMessage: {max, plural, one {Must be # character or less} other {Must be # characters or less}}

ra.validation.minLength.defaultMessage: {min, plural, one {Must be # character at least} other {Must be # characters at least}}

ra.validation.number.description: Validation error message for number inputs

ra.validation.required.description: Validation error message for required inputs

ra.validation.unique.description: Validation error message for unique inputs
